docs.name: Hover Reveal Card
docs.description: Card that displays an image with teaser content, then slides up a full details panel on hover with staggered Motion.dev animations.

props.name: image
props.description: URL of the image displayed as the card's primary visual.

props.name: imageAlt
props.description: Accessible alt text attached to the img element.

props.name: tag
props.description: Small uppercase label rendered above the heading in both states.

props.name: title
props.description: Primary headline text displayed in both the default and reveal states.

props.name: subtitle
props.description: Supporting line shown beneath the title in the default state and as a footer in the reveal panel.

props.name: description
props.description: Extended body copy that appears only inside the slide-up hover panel.

props.name: ctaText
props.description: Call-to-action label rendered at the bottom of the hover panel.

props.name: href
props.description: When supplied the wrapper renders as an anchor element pointing to this URL.

props.name: accentColor
props.description: Hex or CSS colour driving the tag, CTA text, and border-glow accent.

props.name: className
props.description: Tailwind utility classes forwarded onto the outermost card wrapper.

props.name: imageHeight
props.description: Pixel height reserved for the image section before the content area.

docs.overview: HoverRevealCard slides a rich content panel up from the bottom of an image card on hover, replacing the static caption with a description, CTA, and accent glow. Great for portfolio grids and blog previews.

scenarios.title: Portfolio project grid
scenarios.description: Display project thumbnails that reveal a description and link when hovered.
scenarios.code:
import { HoverRevealCard } from "@/components/ui/hover-reveal-card"; export default function PortfolioGrid() { return (
); }

scenarios.title: Blog post preview cards
scenarios.description: Turn a simple blog listing into an interactive card grid with article descriptions on hover.
